'''鈭歷-r-n''' ('''kavaran''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kneel|kneel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kneel|kneel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| kavaran
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivaran|thivaran]] || [[word:jivaran|jivaran]] || [[word:shivaran|shivaran]] || [[word:kivaran|kivaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvaran|thuthuvaran]] || [[word:jujuvaran|jujuvaran]] || [[word:shushuvaran|shushuvaran]] || [[word:kukuvaran|kukuvaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvaran|thuvaran]] || [[word:juvaran|juvaran]] || [[word:shuvaran|shuvaran]] || [[word:kuvaran|kuvaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvaran|thuvaran]] || [[word:juvaran|juvaran]] || [[word:shuvaran|shuvaran]] || [[word:kuvaran|kuvaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevaran|thevaran]] || [[word:jevaran|jevaran]] || [[word:shevaran|shevaran]] || [[word:kevaran|kevaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovaran|thothovaran]] || [[word:jojovaran|jojovaran]] || [[word:shoshovaran|shoshovaran]] || [[word:kokovaran|kokovaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovaran|thovaran]] || [[word:jovaran|jovaran]] || [[word:shovaran|shovaran]] || [[word:kovaran|kovaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovaran|thovaran]] || [[word:jovaran|jovaran]] || [[word:shovaran|shovaran]] || [[word:kovaran|kovaran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙varan|th忙varan]] || [[word:j忙varan|j忙varan]] || [[word:sh忙varan|sh忙varan]] || [[word:k忙varan|k忙varan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavaran|thathavaran]] || [[word:jajavaran|jajavaran]] || [[word:shashavaran|shashavaran]] || [[word:kakavaran|kakavaran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavaran|thavaran]] || [[word:javaran|javaran]] || [[word:shavaran|shavaran]] || [[word:kavaran|kavaran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavaran|thavaran]] || [[word:javaran|javaran]] || [[word:shavaran|shavaran]] || [[word:kavaran|kavaran]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavaran|shavaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavaran|goshavaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavaran|gokishavaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavaran眉|shavaran眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavarankn眉|goshavarankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavaran眉|gokishavaran眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavaransh毛|shavaransh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavaranksh毛|goshavaranksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavaransh毛|gokishavaransh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavaranro|shavaranro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavarankro|goshavarankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavaranro|gokishavaranro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavaranmu|shavaranmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavarankmu|goshavarankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavaranmu|gokishavaranmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavaransher|shavaransher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavaranksher|goshavaranksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavaransher|gokishavaransher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavarang|shavarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavarankng|goshavarankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavarang|gokishavarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavaranya|shavaranya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavarankya|goshavarankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavaranya|gokishavaranya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavaranyam|shavaranyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavarankyam|goshavarankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavaranyam|gokishavaranyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavaran眉sh毛|shavaran眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavarankn眉sh毛|goshavarankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavaran眉sh毛|gokishavaran眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavaran眉ro|shavaran眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavarankn眉ro|goshavarankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavaran眉ro|gokishavaran眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavaran眉mu|shavaran眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavarankn眉mu|goshavarankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavaran眉mu|gokishavaran眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavaransh毛n眉|shavaransh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavaranksh毛n眉|goshavaranksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavaransh毛n眉|gokishavaransh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavaransh毛ro|shavaransh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavaranksh毛ro|goshavaranksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavaransh毛ro|gokishavaransh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavaransh毛mu|shavaransh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavaranksh毛mu|goshavaranksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavaransh毛mu|gokishavaransh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavaranron眉|shavaranron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavarankron眉|goshavarankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavaranron眉|gokishavaranron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavaranrosh毛|shavaranrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavarankrosh毛|goshavarankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavaranrosh毛|gokishavaranrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavaranromu|shavaranromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavarankromu|goshavarankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavaranromu|gokishavaranromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavaranmun眉|shavaranmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavarankmun眉|goshavarankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavaranmun眉|gokishavaranmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavaranmush毛|shavaranmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavarankmush毛|goshavarankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavaranmush毛|gokishavaranmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavaranmuro|shavaranmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavarankmuro|goshavarankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavaranmuro|gokishavaranmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
